body_excerpt: In onbind of ShannonRcsService.java, there is a possible access to protect data due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In onbind of ShannonRcsService.java, there is a possible access to protect data due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privileg
